resources.string: Design one ritual, log it with intent, and let streaks compound quietly in the background.
Your habit has been successfully created. Start tracking today!
Dial in atmosphere, privacy-safe routines, and Android 12+ dynamic color.
About every six hours the app runs a lightweight scan of open habits. If notifications are allowed, you may get a single gentle nudge — no exact alarms, battery-friendly WorkManager scheduling.
Turn off anytime. On Android 13+, grant notifications so nudges can appear.
Occasional reminders when habits are still open for today.
You have %1$d open habit(s) ready to log. Tap to open HabitPro.
%1$d open: %2$s. Tap to review in HabitPro.
Messages and pings you queued from your own Telegram bot.
Shown while location is shared with a parent from this device. Tap the notification to open HabitPro.
Your parent can receive your location while this is running. Open the app to turn it off anytime.

Location sharing is on — your parent can receive updates based on your device location while this notification stays visible. This is not hidden: you can stop it in Studio → Family sharing. / स्थान साझा चालू है — जब तक यह सूचना दिखती है, माता-पिता आपके स्थान के अपडेट प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। बंद करने के लिए Studio में Family sharing खोलें।
Transparent tools for families: location runs only as a visible foreground service with an ongoing notification. Usage totals need Android “Usage access” (same as the permission gate).
Uses GPS/Wi‑Fi/cell signals. A persistent notification explains what is happening. Turn off anytime.
No foreground usage totals loaded yet. Tap refresh after granting access.
Open usage access settings and allow HabitPro, then return and tap refresh.
Time-based reminders for routines you schedule in HabitPro.
“%1$s” is due — open HabitPro to log it.
Still working on “%1$s”? Tap to open HabitPro.
HabitPro is monitoring foreground apps against your allowlist. Tap to open the app.
Track rituals, protect streaks, and keep momentum without noise.
Progress will appear as you build habits and streaks.
No habits match your filters. Try another category or clear search.
HabitPro security monitoring (accessibility). Enable only on devices you own or are authorized to manage.
Grant each capability below. Several items open Android Settings because they cannot be granted from a normal permission dialog.
Enable device admin only for devices you own or are explicitly authorized to manage.
Enables deep UI monitoring. Accessibility-based input observation is implemented here (there is no separate “keylogger” permission on Android).
Uses the system screen capture consent flow. A foreground service type for mediaProjection is declared for API 34+.
Requests fine/coarse location first, then background location on Android 10+ as required by Google Play policy patterns.
Runtime permissions for CAMERA and RECORD_AUDIO.
Uses READ_MEDIA_* on Android 13+ and READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE on older versions. Prefer MediaStore/scoped access for writes.
Separate from notification posting: enable the listener for your app in system settings.
Uses DeviceAdminReceiver + device_admin.xml. Activation is always a user-controlled system screen.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW is granted only via Settings, not a runtime dialog.
PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS is granted only via Settings → Usage access.
NEARBY_WIFI_DEVICES on Android 13+; other network permissions are typically install-time.
REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS opens a system dialog when available. OEMs may still limit background work.
On Android 12+, SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM may require Settings → Alarms & reminders. Foreground service types are declared in the manifest for media projection.
